items.title: American Express Is Spiking Higher -- Here's Why
items.author: Matt Frankel
items.description: The stock market is rallying due to tamer-than-expected inflation data and strong bank earnings. Several big banks reported better-than-expected results for the fourth quarter, and the lower inflation increases the likelihood of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates in 2025, which could be a catalyst for higher bank profits.
